### entry-2026-03-01-a
Source: standup note
We decided Gmail receipt routing stays Ramp-first — company-brain only forwards mail to Ramp's inbox, no full transaction reconciliation.

### entry-2026-03-02-b
Source: eng sync
Linear is the cross-platform task hub; completion on a Linear issue propagates to Gmail/Granola/Slack via task_bindings.
